paragraphs.text: Each suite is carved into the volcanic cliffs of the Aegean, hand-finished with obsidian stone, brushed gold, and uninterrupted sightlines to the open sea.
From a king-bed pavilion at the cliff's edge to a private villa with its own obsidian-tiled pool, every retreat is yours alone.
A serene pavilion suspended above the caldera with a king bed framed by floor-to-ceiling glass and a private stone terrace for sunset bathing.
Carved directly into the cliffside, this cocoon features a sunken stone soaking tub lit by the shifting reflections of the Aegean below.
A two-storey retreat with a mezzanine reading nook and 270° glass walls offering sunrise, sunset, and starlight in a single horizon.
Hidden among olive groves and wild thyme, this ground-level suite opens to a private walled garden with a heated plunge pool.
A standalone villa with two bedrooms, a polished obsidian infinity pool, outdoor fireplace, and dedicated concierge for the duration of your stay.
Crowning the restored 19th-century lighthouse — a circular living room, rooftop terrace, and the highest views on the headland.
Every key at the retreat — from the smallest pavilion to the lighthouse tower — comes with the same uncompromising care.
Our reservations team curates each stay personally. Select a suite that calls to you and we will tailor the rest.
A clifftop retreat on the southern Aegean — twenty-four private suites, a sea-cave dining grotto, and a horizon that holds nothing back.

visibleText: Obsidian Cove Sanctuary Suites Dining Experiences Reserve Accommodations Our 24 Suites Each suite is carved into the volcanic cliffs of the Aegean, hand-finished with obsidian stone, brushed gold, and uninterrupted sightlines to the open sea. Six Categories · Twenty-Four Keys Refuges Above the Sea From a king-bed pavilion at the cliff's edge to a private villa with its own obsidian-tiled pool, every retreat is yours alone. Cliff Edge · 01 Cliff Edge King 62 m² · Sleeps 2 · Sea View A serene pavilion suspended above the caldera with a king bed framed by floor-to-ceiling glass and a private stone terrace for sunset bathing. From €480 / night View Suite Grotto · 02 Sea Grotto Suite 78 m² · Sleeps 2 · Cave Bath Carved directly into the cliffside, this cocoon features a sunken stone soaking tub lit by the shifting reflections of the Aegean below. From €620 / night View Suite Panorama · 03 Panorama Loft 94 m² · Sleeps 3 · Loft Level A two-storey retreat with a mezzanine reading nook and 270° glass walls offering sunrise, sunset, and starlight in a single horizon. From €740 / night View Suite Garden · 04 Garden Plunge Double 68 m² · Sleeps 2 · Plunge Pool Hidden among olive groves and wild thyme, this ground-level suite opens to a private walled garden with a heated plunge pool. From €540 / night View Suite Villa · 05 Obsidian Pool Villa 142 m² · Sleeps 4 · Infinity Pool A standalone villa with two bedrooms, a polished obsidian infinity pool, outdoor fireplace, and dedicated concierge for the duration of your stay. From €1,180 / night View Suite Penthouse · 06 Lighthouse Penthouse 168 m² · Sleeps 4 · Tower Suite Crowning the restored 19th-century lighthouse — a circular living room, rooftop terrace, and the highest views on the headland. From €1,460 / night View Suite Included With Every Suite The Obsidian Standard Every key at the retreat — from the smallest pavilion to the lighthouse tower — comes with the same uncompromising care. 24 Private Keys 6 Suite Categories 100% Sea Views 1:1 Concierge Ratio Choose Your Refuge Our reservations team curates each stay personally. Select a suite that calls to you and we will tailor the rest.
